perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman sits in a living room holding two Labubu blind boxes, one red and one white; she looks at the camera with an inquisitive expression. (2) She shows the back of the white box to highlight the QR code and authenticity stickers. (3) She opens the white box and pulls out a mint-green plush Labubu figure, reacting with excitement. (4) A small white dog jumps up and tries to play with the plush. (5) She opens the red Coca-Cola collaboration box to reveal a white plush wearing a Santa-like hat and holding a Coke bottle. (6) She holds both plushies side-by-side, comparing their facial features and symmetry.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo pop music begins immediately as the female speaker talks in an energetic and curious tone. (2) Crisp sound effects of cardboard tearing and plastic rustling are audible as she unboxes the toys. (3) The speaker's voice alternates between Mandarin and Korean phrases, maintaining a high-pitched, excited delivery. (4) Brief ambient sound of a dog barking or moving can be heard in the middle of the clip. (5) The background music remains consistent until the end, providing a rhythmic backdrop to her commentary.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: "POV 第一次買拉布布確定是正貨嗎？" (First time buying Labubu, is it genuine?). (2) Functional Text: "在韓國買到LABUBU！" (Bought Labubu in Korea!). (3) Effect Text: "有QR" (Has QR code) and "(期待)" (Anticipation). (4) Descriptive Text: "好像正貨嗎？" (Does it look genuine?) and "QR掃得到" (QR code can be scanned).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Box Inspection -> First Unboxing -> Interaction with Dog -> Second Unboxing -> Comparison

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator visible throughout the unboxing.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a simple white t-shirt, appearing in a home setting.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior with a blue sofa, a white electric fan, and a light-colored rug.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Unboxing Process -> Detailed Examination -> Verification
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To share an unboxing experience and seek community help or provide a guide on verifying the authenticity of Labubu plush toys purchased through a Korean app.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be a personal shopping haul and authenticity check rather than a paid promotion.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of POV text hooks and bilingual Mandarin-Korean commentary.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video capitalizes on the Labubu toy trend and addresses consumer anxiety regarding counterfeit products from third-party apps.
